headline: ‘If they rise, they rise’: Trump has zero concern for spiking US gas prices  — says Iran operation ‘far more important’
summary: Prices have jumped to the highest national average since 2024 in the span of one week.

headline: Steve Eisman Warns This 'Slow Brewing Scandal' Could Spark The Next Financial Crisis
summary: Steve Eisman, the investor who predicted the 2008 mortgage crisis, says private credit’s grip on the life insurance industry is “a slow brewing scandal which could be one day a great financial crisis.” On the Real Eisman Playbook podcast, Eisman and forensic accountant Tom Gober laid out a case that firms like Apollo Global Management Inc, KKR & Co Inc and Brookfield Asset Management Ltd are using captive insurance divisions to buy their own private credit paper.
